source_pr.title: server: fix leak for test `TestDumpStatsAPI`
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #15643 

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?
fix go routine leak due to forgetting to close domain and store


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test
- Integration test

Side effects

symptoms: PR body: fix go routine leak due to forgetting to close domain and store.
failure_signature: PR body: fix go routine leak due to forgetting to close domain and store.
root_cause_explanation: Insufficient evidence to determine the underlying root cause from the available case data; needs CI logs or a reliable repro.

evidence: evidence: PR body: fix go routine leak due to forgetting to close domain and store.
evidence: diff changes TestDumpStatsAPI to defer ds.stopServer(c) instead of ds.server.Close(), ensuring full cleanup and avoiding leak (server/statistics_handler_test.go).
